items.title: Overview
items.description: What the protocol is, how the loop works, and how this reference is organized.

items.title: Addresses
items.description: Every protocol contract on Ethereum mainnet, with ABI and reference links.

items.title: How to read these docs
items.description: Conventions used across the reference, and where the machine-readable versions live.

items.title: The $111 token
items.description: The protocol's ERC20, its official pool, the swap skim, and the venue-scoped transfer tax.

items.title: Skim hook (ArtCoinsHookSkimFee)
items.description: The V4 hook on the official pool. Takes the 6% skim on swap volume, splits it three ways at swap time, and attests official-pool buys tax-exempt.

items.title: PermanentCollection
items.description: The records-only permanent core of the protocol.

items.title: Patron
items.description: Patron is the protocol's acquisition entry point.

items.title: ReturnAuctionModule
items.description: ReturnAuctionModule runs the 72-hour return auction that follows every acquisition.

items.title: ReturnAuctionEscrow
items.description: Transient settlement escrow that makes the 2017 CryptoPunks market record a real `PunkBought(seller, buyer, price)` for every cleared return auction, instead of a price-less `PunkTransfer`.

items.title: PunkVault
items.description: `PunkVault` is the immutable terminal custodian for vaulted Punks.

items.title: LiveBidAdapter
items.description: LiveBidAdapter is the single inflow governor for the live bid.

items.title: BuybackBurner
items.description: BuybackBurner converts queued ETH into $111 and removes it from circulation.

items.title: VaultBurnPool
items.description: Burn accumulator released on every vault-path settle.

items.title: ProtocolFeePhaseAdapter
items.description: Lean forwarder for the protocol leg of the official pool's fee skim.

items.title: ReferralPayout
items.description: Pull-based per-referrer ETH ledger for swap referrals on the official pool.

items.title: PunkVaultTitleAuction
items.description: One-shot, permissionless English auction that sells the Vault Title, ERC721 token id 111 on `PunkVault`.

items.title: PCSwapContext
items.description: Shared reentrancy-detection registry for the protocol.

items.title: TokenAdminPoker
items.description: Retained-admin holder of the $111 token's `tokenAdmin` role.

items.title: ProtocolAdmin
items.description: The protocol's single, time-locked admin role.

items.title: RendererRegistry
items.description: The stable address fronting the protocol's renderer.

items.title: PermanentCollectionMosaicRenderer
items.description: The shipped renderer, installed behind `RendererRegistry`.

items.title: PermanentCollectionProofRenderer
items.description: On-chain SVG + JSON renderer for the 111 Proof NFTs issued by `PunkVault` (token ids 0..110, where `tokenId == traitId` directly).

items.title: PunkSvgFragmentCache
items.description: Public, permissionless on-chain cache of compact 24x24 SVG fragments derived from the canonical CryptoPunks pixel data.

items.title: TraitIconCache
items.description: Public, permissionless on-chain cache of compact SVG fragments for the 111 CryptoPunks trait icons, companion to `PunkSvgFragmentCache` (that one caches whole-Punk tiles for collected cells; this one caches the trait icons drawn in uncollec

items.title: Accept the live bid
items.description: The end-to-end flow for selling an eligible Punk to the protocol at the live bid.

items.title: Bid on a return auction
items.description: Find live return auctions, compute the minimum bid, place and settle bids, and collect refunds.

items.title: Run a keeper
items.description: The permissionless calls that keep value moving through the protocol, how to check readiness off-chain, and a minimal viem loop that sends them when profitable.

items.title: Swap with referral attribution
items.description: How to attach referral attribution to a $111 swap via V4 hookData, get credited in ReferralPayout on every swap, and claim the accrued ETH.

items.title: Contribute to the live bid
items.description: Route ETH into the live bid with attributed contributions or bare sends to LiveBidAdapter.

items.title: Read the collection state
items.description: The read surface an integrator or agent needs, contract by contract, plus how to decode the 111-bit trait masks and cast one-liners for the headline numbers.

items.title: Indexer (GraphQL)
items.description: The protocol's Ponder indexer, every table it maintains, the contract events that feed each one, and example GraphQL queries.

items.title: REST endpoints
items.description: The site's public read endpoints under /api, their parameters, response shapes, and caching behavior.

items.title: ABIs and the protocol manifest
items.description: The machine-readable entry points, the protocol manifest, served ABI files, llms.txt, and the docs search index, with a viem loading example.

items.title: Access control
items.description: Every state-changing function and who may call it.

items.title: Errors index
items.description: Every custom error, its contract, and the condition that raises it.

items.title: Events index
items.description: Every event the protocol emits, grouped by contract.
